archetype_description: Needs to know others have done this successfully. Case studies and reviews are essential.
data_note: Only 0 entries with this archetype assigned. Profiler has not run on most entries — scores will improve as Lead Psychology Profiler processes more leads.

meeting_guidance.opening_approach: Open with a comparable success story: 'A property just like yours in [area] is earning £X with us right now.'
meeting_guidance.what_to_lead_with: Real case studies from similar properties in similar areas.
meeting_guidance.what_to_avoid: Generic claims. 'We manage lots of properties' is not social proof. Names, locations, and figures are.
meeting_guidance.close_approach: Offer to connect them with an existing client: 'Would it help to hear from someone who's been with us 12 months?'
meeting_guidance.offer_framing: Reference other converted leads: 'This is the same rate we offered [similar profile] — they signed last month.'

delay_signal_pattern: Insufficient data — fewer than 5 entries with this archetype. Check again after profiler has processed more leads.
green_light_pattern: Insufficient data — fewer than 5 entries with this archetype. Check again after profiler has processed more leads.
